title: WAVE product billing config
description: Per-deployment billing.config.yaml — the settlement TOPOLOGY (how/where a product's usage is collected), companion to pricing.yaml (what it costs). Code is authoritative; this declares which provider is the invoicing-of-record, which are shadows, the audit mirror, and the cents passthrough invariant. See frameworks/billing/README.md.

authoritative.description: The invoicing-of-record provider (issues the collectible invoice). 'none' = ledger-only, billing dark (the safe default until a deliberate go-live). Recommended live default: 'stripe'.

shadows.description: Providers that RATE the same usage but never collect (collect=false) — rating oracles for reconcile + dual-readiness. Must not include the authoritative provider.

mirror.description: The audit/analytics store (third system of record). It never prices.

passthrough_unit_decimal.description: THE CENTS INVARIANT. The metered price charges 100 cents per unit-of-summed-value, so invoice_cents = Σ(amount_usd dollars) × 100. This MUST be the string '100'. Any other value silently mis-bills (the 100× class). Pinned as a const so the schema itself rejects a regression.

idempotency.description: Dedup discipline: one UUID minted per billable decision, sent verbatim to every sink (ledger + authoritative + shadows + mirror). Pinned so a config can't silently disable cross-store dedup.

meters.description: The meters this product bills and their CENTS rate (= code-dollars × 100). Names MUST be canonical meters from frameworks/pricing (no product-local twins).

rate_cents.description: Rate stored in CENTS = code-dollars × 100 (e.g. $0.0001/decision → 0.01; a $1/unit passthrough meter → 100). Dollars-as-cents here is a silent 100× under-bill.

aggregation.description: Meter aggregation; must match the provider meter's default_aggregation.

metronome_connection_gated.description: True until the dashboard/OAuth org→Stripe connection + a prod Metronome key exist. While true, Metronome may only be a shadow, never authoritative in prod.

then.description: Metronome cannot be the invoicing-of-record provider until its org connection is established (metronome_connection_gated=false).
